text: Hey bud, haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything good?
Yeah all good dad, just buried in clinical and training. Sorry for going quiet
No worries, just checking. Call me this weekend when you get a chance
Hey honey, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay?
Yeah mom I'm good, just slammed with clinical rotations. Sorry for going quiet 😅
As long as you're alright! Call me when you get a chance, I miss your voice ❤️
Hi sweetheart, just checking in on you. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay?
Hey Grandma! Sorry, been swamped with school. All good though. How's the knitting going?
Oh I'm fine dear, just miss you. Come visit soon, I baked a fresh batch of cardamom buns 😊
are we still doing the meal prep thing friday or nah? you've been a ghost all week lol
yes sorry, dead after clinical 😭 same plan? I'll do the Aldi run after my shift
perfect, grab oats and spinach. and NOT the saddest chicken this time, splurge the extra dollar
omg did you see the group photo from grandma's birthday 😭 why does mine look like that lmaooo
hahaha yours isn't even bad, have you seen mine?? I look half asleep, came straight from a night shift
ok fair lol we should retake one at the Boundary Waters trip, get everyone in this time
hey, it's been a while — how's training going?
honestly same old, between clinical and ski training I have no life lol. doing any longer roller ski sets this off-season?
yeah, did a solid roller ski block last week. let's sync before the next group session
Did you eat before the long session?
Ring me when you have a minute, dear.
Snow's good in Duluth, come up.
Trail conditions looked rough up north, drive safe.
Care package is on the way.
Keep icing after the high-volume days.
The strawberry jam is ready for you.
Skis are in the hallway again 🙄
Nice race result, proud of you.
Love you, call when you can.
Come by Sunday if you can.
Environmental repo is due, wish me luck.
Good session today, form looked clean.
